intro.title: Welcome to Jokers of Neon
intro.content: Let's walk through the <1>basics</1> of the game.

pointsTarget.title: Beating a Level
pointsTarget.content: To beat a level, hit the <1>target score</1> by playing poker hands.

playableHand.step-1: Use the cards in your <1>hand</1> to play poker hands
playableHand.step-2: No poker hand? Use a <1>discard</1> to get new cards. Let's try it.
playableHand.pair: Great! A <1>PAIR</1> of 7s. Let's play it!
playableHand.secondPair: Nice! We have a <1>PAIR</1> of 5s. Time to play.
playableHand.flush: Using the <5>Club Modifier</5> creates a <2>FLUSH</2>! <3/> Let's play it.
playableHand.plays: Click here to see all possible poker hands you can make.

discardCards.title: Discard
discardCards.content: Click the <1>discard button</1> to get new cards.

playCards.title: Play Cards
playCards.content: Hit the <1>play button</1> to use your selected cards.

pointsMultiplier.title: Points & Multiplier
pointsMultiplier.content: Each poker hand has base <1>points</1> and a <2>multiplier</2> that boost your final score.

score.content: Great job! Your last play hit the <1>target score</1>. Time to play for real. <2>Good luck!</2>

specialCards.title: Special Cards
specialCards.content: <1>Special Cards</1> are game-changers with powerful effects. You can buy them in the <2>Store</2>.

modifiers.title: Modifier Cards
modifiers.content: Modifier cards can change your other cards.<1/> In this case, it will change the modified card's suit to Clubs.
modifiers.drag: Drag the <5>Club modifier</5> onto the <4>8 of Hearts</4> card, then click 'Next'.

power-ups.title: Power-ups
power-ups.content: <1>Power-ups</1> give you extra <2>points</2> and <3>multi</3>. They are single-use, but you can buy more in the Store.

coins.title: Coins
coins.content: Well done! You've earned <1>coins</1> for beating the level. Time to spend them in the <1>Store</1>.

levelUpHands.title: Level Up Hands
levelUpHands.content: Upgrade your poker hands to score more <1>points</1> and <1>multipliers</1>.

buyPacks.title: Buy Packs
buyPacks.content: Get <1>packs</1> to boost your deck with rare and special cards at a lower cost.

buyCards.title: Buy Cards
buyCards.content: Buy <1>Traditional</1> and <1>Neon</1> cards here. Neon cards score double points and +1 multi!

modifiers.title: Modifiers
modifiers.content: </1>Modifiers</1> are added to your deck and apply effects to your cards, like adding points or changing suits.

specialCards.title: Special Cards
specialCards.content: </1>Special Cards</1> grant unique global powers that activate immediately. They can turn the tide of the game!

rerollStore.title: Reroll the Store
rerollStore.content: Don't see what you need? Spend <1>coins</1> to reroll the store for a fresh set of items.

nextLevel.title: Next Level
nextLevel.content: Ready for the next challenge? Click here to continue!

specialCards.title: Special Cards
specialCards.content: </1>Special Cards</1> activate right after you buy them and apply their effects after you play a hand.

discardingCards.title: Discarding Special Cards
discardingCards.content: Don't need a <1>Special Card</1>? Click the discard icon on the card to remove it.
discardingCards.content-mobile: Don't need a <1>Special Card</1>? Drag it to the discard button to remove it.

modifierCard.title: Modifier Card
modifierCard.content: <1>Modifier Cards</1> boost or change other cards. Drag a modifier onto a selected card to apply its effect.

discard.title: Discard Modifiers
discard.content: Click the discard icon on the modifier to remove it. This won't cost you a discard.
discard.content-mobile: Drag the modifier to the discard button to remove it. This won't cost you a discard.

firstEntry.title: Welcome to your first Jokers of Neon run
firstEntry.objective: Your goal is to score points by making poker hands.
firstEntry.selectContent: You can select up to 5 cards from your hand to build poker hands.
firstEntry.playsContent: We got you covered. Tap this button to see all possible hands.

firstTwoSelected.discardContent: You can also discard your cards to draw new ones.

firstModifier.title: Modifier card
firstModifier.content: This is a modifier card. Modifiers apply an effect to a specific card.
firstModifier.howToUseContent: For example, this one turns one of your cards into {{effect}}. To use it, drag it to one of the preselected cards in the center of the screen.

firstSpecialCard.title: Special cards
firstSpecialCard.content: Special cards have global effects over the whole game. They are the most powerful cards, so make sure to buy them if you want to go far.
firstSpecialCard.alwaysOnContent: Special cards stay active all the time. As long as you keep them, their effects stay active.

firstPowerUp.title: Power-ups
firstPowerUp.content: Power-ups are consumables that give you extra points or multi for a specific play.
firstPowerUp.activateContent: Tap to activate them. Once activated, they will be applied on your next play.

firstNeonCard.title: Neon cards
firstNeonCard.content: Neon cards are used to build poker hands just like traditional cards, but they are stronger. They give double points and +1 multi.
firstNeonCard.neonPlaysContent: If you make a hand with only neon cards, its level will increase 4 times, giving even more points and multi.

firstScore.title: Nice!
firstScore.content: You scored {{score}} points. You need {{targetScore}} points to clear the round.
firstScore.contentFirstPlayClear: You scored {{score}} points. You needed {{targetScore}} to clear the round, and you did it on your first play.

firstEntry.title: Round rewards
firstEntry.overview: Here you can see everything you earned after finishing the round.
firstEntry.efficiencyContent: The more hands and discards you keep, the more rewards you get.
firstEntry.totalContent: This is the final amount you take from this round.

firstEntry.title: Welcome to the map
firstEntry.pathsContent: You can choose different paths to move forward.
firstEntry.shopContent: Choose one available shop to move forward. Each shop type offers different items.
firstEntry.shopTypesContent: Each type of shop offers different items.

firstEntry.title: Welcome to your first shop
firstEntry.welcome: You will be able to buy items to improve your deck.
firstEntry.rerollContent: Items are random, but you can reroll if you don't like what you got.
firstEntry.nextContent: Whenever you are ready, click next to move on.
